attributes.content:
## Overview

The HTML Mockup card gives the workspace a structured home for live HTML/CSS concept rendered in an iframe. Generate via AI (Gemini, Claude) and iterate. Interactive prototype card.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

HTML Mockup usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[AI Image]]** -- HTML Mockup can incorporate generated visuals or treat image output as a linked asset.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn HTML Mockup into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- HTML Mockup can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Task]]** -- HTML Mockup often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Document]]** -- HTML Mockup can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Brand Guide]]** -- Brand Guide can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around HTML Mockup.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create HTML Mockup as the structured home for live HTML/CSS concept rendered in an iframe. Generate via AI (Gemini, Claude) and iterate. Interactive prototype card and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates HTML Mockup when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** HTML Mockup stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
